title.en: China-to-Poland Solar PV Inverter Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国太阳能光伏逆变器进入波兰：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國太陽能光伏逆變器進入波蘭：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China solar PV inverter documentation against Poland (PKN/URE/PSE) expectations: PKN-adopted standards routes, URE and PSE grid-connection processes, CE-marking-aligned requirements, IEC 62109, IEC 62116, IEC 61727, IEC 62920 and IEC 61000 evidence, with 230/400 V 50 Hz grid settings and Gdansk/Gdynia as the main ports — versus China GB/T 37408, NB/T 32004, and GB/T 19964 baselines.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国太阳能光伏逆变器文件与波兰（PKN/URE/PSE）要求的对照，包括PKN采用路径、URE/PSE并网审查、EU CE一致性证据、IEC 62109、IEC 62116、防孤岛和IEC 62920 / IEC 61000 证据；并考虑230/400 V、50 Hz电网与格但斯克/格丁尼亚主要港口，与中国 GB/T 37408、NB/T 32004 和 GB/T 19964 基准比较。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國太陽能光伏逆變器文件與波蘭（PKN/URE/PSE）要求的對照，包括PKN採用路徑、URE/PSE併網審查、EU CE一致性證據、IEC 62109、IEC 62116、防孤島和IEC 62920 / IEC 61000 證據；並考慮230/400 V、50 Hz 電網與格但斯克/格丁尼亞主要港口，與中國 GB/T 37408、NB/T 32004 和 GB/T 19964 基準比較。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, standards determination, grid-operator approval, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters and importers should verify current Poland (PKN/URE/PSE) requirements with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、标准裁定、并网审批、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商和安装方在出货或安装前应与合格专业人士核验现行波兰（PKN/URE/PSE）要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、標準裁定、併網核准、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商和安裝方在出貨或安裝前應與合格專業人士核驗現行波蘭（PKN/URE/PSE）要求。

answer_first.en: For solar PV inverters exported from China to Poland, practical gaps are: confirm the applicable PKN route and project-level approval path; validate that IEC 62109-1/-2 safety testing, IEC 62116 anti-islanding, IEC 61727 utility-interface evidence, and IEC 62920 / IEC 61000 EMC documentation are accepted for Poland installations; and prove 230/400 V 50 Hz performance, protection thresholds, reconnection timing, and weather derating for Polish climate conditions. Poland's large and growing PV market means active URE and PSE oversight for larger installations. China GB/T 37408, NB/T 32004, and GB/T 19964 documents are useful but not automatically interchangeable with Poland evidence.
answer_first.zh: 中国太阳能光伏逆变器出口波兰时，主要差距包括：确认PKN适用路径与项目级审批，核实IEC 62109-1/-2 安全型式试验、IEC 62116 防孤岛、IEC 61727 并网接口和IEC 62920/IEC 61000 EMC证据是否被波兰项目接受，并验证230/400 V 50 Hz下的保护阈值、重连延迟和波兰气候条件降额；中国GB/T 37408、NB/T 32004 与 GB/T 19964证据不能自动替代波兰证据。
answer_first.zht: 中國太陽能光伏逆變器出口波蘭時，主要差距包括：確認PKN適用路徑與專案級審核，核實IEC 62109-1/-2 安全型式試驗、IEC 62116 防孤島、IEC 61727 並網介面和IEC 62920/IEC 61000 EMC證據是否被波蘭專案接受，並驗證230/400 V 50 Hz下的保護閾值、重連延遲和波蘭氣候條件降額；中國GB/T 37408、NB/T 32004 與 GB/T 19964證據不能自動替代波蘭證據。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, grid operator, utility, customs, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
